user.title: Connect to FreshTomato Router
user.description:
Enter your FreshTomato router details.

To find your **HTTP ID**: open the router admin page in a browser, view the page source (Ctrl+U), and search for `http_id`.

data_description.http_id: Found in the router admin page source code (search for 'http_id')

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check IP address, port, and that the router is reachable.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check username, password, and HTTP ID.
error.invalid_http_id: The HTTP ID appears to be incorrect.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the HA logs for details.
